## Dr. Arun Sharma

MBBS, MD (Internal Medicine) Reg. No: KA/45678/2015 City Medical Centre, Bengaluru

| Patient Name   | Rajesh Kumar   |
|----------------|----------------|
| Age            | 39 Years       |
| Gender         | Male           |
| Date           | 20-06-2026     |

## Chief Complaint

Fever since 3 days, body ache.

## Diagnosis

Viral Fever

## Prescription

1. Paracetamol 650mg - 1 tablet three times daily for 5 days
2. Vitamin C 500mg - once daily for 7 days

## Investigations

CBC Test
